sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37003" key="e)cau/strion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαύσ-τριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> foreg., ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11(2).161</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">C</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">70</biblScope> </bibl> (Delos, <date TEIform="date">iii B.C.</date>).</entryFree>
